violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by cups and dish soap in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Objects removed from sink basin at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Staff informed to sanitize and allow all dishes to air dry before returning them to service. All dishes that were previously washed were cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by Italian ice lids. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Lids were moved into 3-Bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
